Educator Service Agreement

Atomic Pathshala
school

Atomic Pathshala

Quantum Tower, Tech City
Bangalore, KA 560103

SERVICE AGREEMENT FOR SENIOR FACULTY (IIT-JEE DIVISION)

This Agreement is made on this 24th day of May, 2024 between Atomic Pathshala Private Limited (the "Company") and Prof. James Sterling (the "Educator").

1. SCOPE OF WORK

The Educator agrees to provide high-performance educational content, live mentoring sessions, and academic curriculum design for the 'NEET Accelerator 2025' batch. Duties include recorded lectures (6 hours/week) and live doubt-solving sessions (4 hours/week).

2. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY

All curriculum designs, lecture notes, and video recordings generated during the tenure of this agreement shall remain the exclusive intellectual property of Atomic Pathshala. The Educator retains credit but waives distribution rights except as authorized by the Board.

3. REMUNERATION

Remuneration shall be strictly based on the performance milestones defined in Appendix A, including Student Retention Rates (Target > 92%) and Average Test Improvement Scores.
